channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: microsoft/skills
item.description: Skills, MCP servers, Custom Agents, Agents.md for SDKs to ground Coding Agents

item.title: openclaw/openclaw
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-openclaw-skills
item.description: The awesome collection of OpenClaw Skills. Formerly known as Moltbot, originally Clawdbot.

item.title: artifact-keeper/artifact-keeper
item.description: Open-source universal artifact registry. Drop-in Artifactory/Nexus alternative with 40+ package formats, security scanning, WASM plugins, and edge replication.

item.title: eljojo/rememory
item.description: have a plan for the worst-case scenario

item.title: pydantic/monty
item.description: A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI

item.title: microsoft/litebox
item.description: A security-focused library OS supporting kernel- and user-mode execution

item.title: antirez/voxtral.c
item.description: Pure C inference of Mistral Voxtral Realtime 4B speech to text model

item.title: laravel/ai
item.description: The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

item.title: antonpk1/excalidraw-mcp-app
item.description: Excalidraw MCP App Server — hand-drawn diagrams for Claude

item.title: BlockRunAI/ClawRouter
item.description: Smart LLM router — save 78% on inference costs. 30+ models, one wallet, x402 micropayments.

item.title: anthropics/claudes-c-compiler
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 wrote a dependency-free C compiler in Rust, with backends targeting x86 (64- and 32-bit), ARM, and RISC-V, capable of compiling a booting Linux kernel.

item.title: foru17/clash-master
item.description: A more beautiful and modern web application that lets you visualize and manage your Clash network traffic

item.title: cloudflare/kumo
item.description: Cloudflare's component library for building modern web applications.

item.title: dreamzero0/dreamzero
item.description: Code to load DreamZero model checkpoints and run evaluation on DROID-sim and Genie Sim 3.0

item.title: callstackincubator/agent-device
item.description: CLI to control iOS and Android devices for AI agents

item.title: puemos/craftplan
item.description: Self-hosted software for managing artisanal D2C micro-businesses

item.title: dwzhu-pku/PaperBanana
item.description: PaperBanana: Automating Academic Illustration For AI Scientists

item.title: lynaghk/vibe
item.description: Easy Linux virtual machine on MacOS to sandbox LLM agents.

item.title: ace-step/ACE-Step-1.5
item.description: The most powerful local music generation model that outperforms most commercial alternatives

item.title: BehiSecc/VibeSec-Skill
item.description: This skill helps Claude write secure code and prevent common vulnerabilities.

item.title: sheeki03/tirith
item.description: Your browser catches homograph attacks. Your terminal doesn't. Tirith guards the gate — intercepts suspicious URLs, ANSI injection, and pipe-to-shell attacks before they execute.

item.title: zai-org/GLM-OCR
item.description: GLM-OCR: Accurate × Fast × Comprehensive

item.title: rit3zh/reacticx
item.description: 💅 Beautiful React Native components. One command away.

item.title: Leey21/awesome-ai-research-writing
item.description: Elevate your AI research writing, no more tedious polishing ✨

item.title: wesm/msgvault
item.description: Archive a lifetime of email and chat. Offline search, analytics, and AI query over your full message history. Powered by DuckDB

item.title: stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash
item.description: Fast, Sharp & Reliable Agentic Intelligence

item.title: agno-agi/dash
item.description: Self-learning data agent that grounds its answers in 6 layers of context and improves with every run. Inspired by OpenAI's in-house implementation.

item.title: m1heng/clawdbot-feishu
item.description: (no description)

item.title: gavrielc/nanoclaw
item.description: My personal Claude assistant that runs in Apple containers. Lightweight, secure, and built to be understood and customized for your own needs.

item.title: ygwyg/MAHORAGA
item.description: autonomous trading agent powered by social sentiment analysis and ai that learns, grows, and adapts

item.title: HKUDS/nanobot
item.description: "🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight Clawdbot"

item.title: rokpiy/auto-commenter
item.description: A Claude skill that automatically posts personalized, authentic comments in your target communities.

item.title: rtvkiz/minimal
item.description: Minimal CVE Hardened container image collection

item.title: harris21/laravel-fuse
item.description: Circuit breaker for Laravel queue jobs

item.title: MoonshotAI/Kimi-K2.5
item.description: Moonshot's most powerful model
